creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
So enabling KDF seems to bring back the interoperability we had up to 5.9.5. For me it doesn't matter if KDF is on or off by default since we can adjust our builds, but still it would likely be beneficial to enable KDF by default to avoid the connection issues in FreeBSD by default as some people may already rely on them.

There are 2 confirmations via https://forum.opnsense.org/index.php?topic=28654.0


Cheers,
Franco
